title: I Updated /grill-me And Solved Claude Code
summary: Chase AI updated the grill-me prompt framework with grill-me-codex, a skill that verifies Claude Code outputs by building validation logic on top of initial planning. The framework extends the original grill-me foundation to address the gap between planning and verification.
